description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE). The NOC needs a dynamic 'Top Offenders' dashboard that automatically surfaces saturated infrastructure nodes without hardcoding instance names, as instances spin up and down frequently. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Dynamic Bottleneck Triage' containing three graphs. The 'Production CPU Saturated Nodes' graph must display the top 2 nodes by highest average CPU utilization (servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*utilization), excluding 'instance_3' (a known batch-processing node), with legends aliased by node index 1. The 'Peak Disk Write Analysis' graph must display the single instance with the highest peak disk write bytes (servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes) aliased by node index 1. The 'Aggregated Fleet Writes' graph must show the sum of all EC2 disk write metrics (servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes) aliased as 'Total Fleet Writes'. Use dynamic wildcards and Graphite functions to ensure the dashboard remains functional as instances change.
